source: Codex connector checks refreshed for Cloudflare runtime resources, Neon project/branch/compute resources, GitHub app account evidence, user-provided GitHub repository URL/screenshot, authenticated git push/git ls-remote verification, and no-secret Cloudflare Worker/Queue/cron bootstrap proof through 2026-07-03

github.note: GitHub app installation was observed for account jinbizman-boop. The user provided the newly created public repository URL https://github.com/jinbizman-boop/salary-hijacking.git and a GitHub Quick setup screenshot for salary-hijacking on 2026-06-30. Authenticated git push succeeded again on 2026-07-01, and origin/main was readable through git ls-remote at the last Git remote evidence refresh commit a49d96720586f3c84eb056b868350578f467dad6. Future commits should be verified with git ls-remote rather than treating this historical evidence commit as self-updating. Existing repositories, including Retro Games and RETRO-DB, must not be modified or used as release targets.

cloudflare.note: Cloudflare connector account access was refreshed for runtime resources at 2026-07-03T16:48:23.313Z. Salary Hijacking bootstrap Workers were created and observed for salary-hijacking-api, salary-hijacking-notifications, salary-hijacking-scheduler, and salary-hijacking-admin, with no secret values or Worker source stored in tracked evidence. Production Queue and dead-letter Queue resource names were created and observed for operations, notifications, scheduler, and growth flows; API, Notifications, and Scheduler cron triggers were configured and observed. The R2 bucket list endpoint still returns Cloudflare error 10042 indicating R2 must be enabled through the dashboard before bucket proof can be collected. The salaryhijacking.com zone was not observed, so custom domains, public URL reachability, and TLS certificate proof remain blocked. A previously observed Pages project named retro-db is unrelated and must not be used for Salary Hijacking. Production Wrangler dry-runs for API, Notifications, and Scheduler passed on 2026-07-01T05:06:36Z after the API Worker config added the salaryhijacking.com and www.salaryhijacking.com public app/legal custom-domain targets for /, /privacy, /support, and /terms.

neon.note: Neon organization access was refreshed at 2026-07-01T08:12:13.024Z. A new Salary Hijacking project named salary-hijacking was observed in organization org-dark-tree-79935393 with main and staging branches ready, PostgreSQL 17, region aws-us-east-2, and two read-write compute endpoints. No connection string, password, token, host, or raw database URL is stored in this evidence file. Existing Retro Games database resources must not be used for Salary Hijacking.
